name: PG & TK
description: Program awal yang fokus pada perkembangan motorik, sosial-emosional, dan kognitif melalui metode bermain sambil belajar.
descriptionEn: An early program focusing on motor, social-emotional, and cognitive development through play-based learning.

name: Sekolah Dasar
description: Program dasar yang membangun fondasi akademik kuat dengan pendekatan integratif dan pengembangan karakter.
descriptionEn: A foundational program building strong academic foundations with an integrative approach and character development.

name: Sekolah Menengah Pertama
description: Program transisi yang mengembangkan pemikiran kritis, kepemimpinan, dan eksplorasi minat akademik.
descriptionEn: A transitional program developing critical thinking, leadership, and academic interest exploration.

name: Sekolah Menengah Atas
description: Program persiapan universitas dengan peminatan IPA, IPS, dan Bahasa, serta program International Baccalaureate.
descriptionEn: A university preparation program with Science, Social, and Language tracks, plus International Baccalaureate program.

name: Ekstrakurikuler
description: Berbagai kegiatan pengembangan bakat dan minat di luar jam akademik, dari olahraga hingga seni budaya.
descriptionEn: Various talent and interest development activities outside academic hours, from sports to cultural arts.
